title: Unity Editor MCP — Command Catalog
description: Structure of the canonical command catalog (commands.json).

knownGaps.description: Baselined, tracked implementation gaps. The drift gate treats these as warnings, not failures.

name.description: verb_noun command type string; identical on both halves.

sides.description: Which halves must implement this command.

internal.description: True for editor commands not exposed as MCP tools.

destructive.description: True if the command can irreversibly change project state (informs confirm-gating).

params.description: JSON Schema for the command parameters — the authoritative server-side input contract.

result.description: JSON Schema for the result payload. Unspecified in protocol v1 (TODO).
